title: CatKits
description: This plugin adds kits that u can make and give to players
body:
CatKits

CatKits is a easy-to-use kit plugin for Paper/Spigot/Bukkit. It lets you create kits with cooldowns, permissions, exact slots, armor, offhand items, and optional inventory clearing.

You can make and edit kits using a simple GUI, no config files needed. Kits can be made from your current inventory too.

Permissions and cooldowns work per kit, and everything is clean and automatic.
